programme.title: Birthday Wish
programme.desc: A woman expecting to get engaged on her all-important 30th birthday gets a different surprise after she makes her birthday wish: a glimpse into her future - which doesn't resemble anything she's ever imagined for herself.

programme.title: Love on the Menu
programme.desc: A chef makes a deal with a frozen food executive in order to save his restaurant. Stars Autumn Reeser, Kavan Smith, Barbara Niven.

programme.title: My Summer Prince
programme.desc: When a prince finds himself in some hot water for his partying ways, the royal family hires a PR consultant. But when she falls ill, her assistant steps in to take control of the campaign and possibly the prince's heart.

programme.title: Love on Safari
programme.desc: After Kira inherits a wildlife reserve in South Africa, she travels there to meet the no-nonsense head ranger, Tom. He urges her to take a safari in hopes that she will fall in love with the land, the animals, and hopefully him.

programme.title: Valentine Ever After
programme.desc: Big city girls Julia and her best friend Sydney take a trip to a dude ranch in Wyoming for a fun weekend getaway, but after a brawl at the local bar, the girls are sentenced to stay in town and perform community service.

programme.title: A Royal Winter
programme.desc: When Maggie Marks faces a career decision, she flees to Europe for some soul searching. There she encounters a handsome European playboy prince, and lands herself in a world she has never known and finds a new direction in life.

programme.title: Love on Ice
programme.desc: Former figure skating champion, Emily James, now 27 years old and considered a relic in the world of figure skating, gets an improbably shot to reclaim skating glory when a young coach sees greatness in her.

programme.title: Dater's Handbook
programme.desc: A woman changes her personality according to a dating guide book to find a husband but realizes the man she wants is the one who loves her for who she is. Stars Meghan Markle and Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: Love on the Air
programme.desc: Competing radio personalities in Chicago find common ground when they have to work together. Stars Alison Sweeney and Jonathan Scarfe.

programme.title: Harvest Moon
programme.desc: When her family goes bankrupt, a city girl travels to the country to try and fix up a struggling pumpkin farm that her father bought as an investment to get her money back. There she meets Brett, the handsome farm manager.

programme.title: Surprised by Love
programme.desc: A young businesswoman tries to convince her uptight parents to accept her boyfriend, but then she falls for an old high-school flame. Stars Hilarie Burton, Paul Campbell, and Tim Conway.

programme.title: Under the Autumn Moon
programme.desc: When an executive convinces her boss that a ranch would be perfect for their company retreats, he agrees to let her check it out. Her plan hits a snag when the owner refuses to sell unless she can promise to preserve its history.

programme.title: Love Takes Flight
programme.desc: In the Hallmark Hall of Fame Presentation, a young girl befriends a lonely widower as a part of her Mission: Find a Friend, uniting their families in a healing twist of fate. Stars Nikki DeLoach and Jeff Hephner.

programme.title: Dating the Delaneys
programme.desc: Three generations of Delaney women explore the highs and lows of modern-day dating, learning that love and romance can be found at any age…and sometimes where you least expect it. Stars Rachel Boston and Paul Campbell.

programme.title: Guiding Emily
programme.desc: Emily's life changes after losing her eyesight, while a guide dog struggles with training. Through a series of missed encounters both overcome their obstacles and find each other. Stars Sarah Drew, Antonio Cupo, Eric McCormack.

programme.title: Love in Paradise
programme.desc: When a Western movie star is forced to spend a PR weekend at a dude ranch, his fans are horrified to learn he's actually a city slicker who's afraid of horses and has never been west of the Hudson River. Stars Luke Perry.

programme.title: A Ring by Spring
programme.desc: A fiercely independent single woman is forced to consider marrying her not-so-perfect boyfriend when a gypsy fortuneteller convinces her she must be engaged by the spring or risk a lifetime alone.

programme.title: Wedding Every Weekend
programme.desc: Nate and Brooke are going to the same four weddings, four weekends in a row. To avoid set-ups, they go together as "wedding buddies." But what starts as a friendship soon becomes deeper. Stars Kimberley Sustad, Paul Campbell.

programme.title: Love Blossoms
programme.desc: Perfumer Violet is desperate to formulate her late father's unfinished signature scent. Under great pressure to finish by Valentine's Day, Violet hires an inexperienced botanist with an uncanny ability to identify scents.

programme.title: All of My Heart
programme.desc: A young caterer's life suddenly changes when she inherits a country home and learns she must share it with a career-obsessed Wall Street trader. Sparks fly when they have to work side-by-side.

programme.title: The Heiress and the Handyman
programme.desc: After losing her fortune, an heiress moves to a rural farm where she mistakes her handsome neighbor for the handyman. To live up to her family's legacy, he helps her compete at the county fair. Stars Jodie Sweetin, Corey Sevier.

programme.title: Autumn at Apple Hill
programme.desc: Elise is trying to keep her family inn afloat when the CFO of a major hotel chain checks in as a guest. Is he there to enjoy the fall season or try to take over her beloved inn? Stars Erin Cahill, Wes Brown.

programme.title: Sweet Autumn
programme.desc: Aunt Dee splits her candy shop between her niece, Maggie, and maple farmer, Dex. Following letters Dee left, the two uncover the reason for her decision, during the Sweet Autumn festival. Stars Nikki DeLoach & Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Love on the Sidelines
programme.desc: A romantic comedy about a down-on-her-luck young woman who falls into a job as a personal assistant to a star quarterback. He's never had a female assistant before and she knows nothing about football.

programme.title: Moonlight in Vermont
programme.desc: When Fiona gets dumped she heads for a week in Vermont at her Dad's country Inn. There she runs into her ex with his new girlfriend. She strikes a deal with the Inn's chef, Derek, to be her "boyfriend" for the week.

programme.title: Branching Out
programme.desc: To help build a family tree, single mom Amelia tracks down her daughter's biological father. It becomes a journey of trust, love, and discovering the meaning of family. Stars Sarah Drew, Juan Pablo Di Pace.

programme.title: My Argentine Heart
programme.desc: Abril goes to Argentina to save her family ranch from being bought by her ex. But when outside forces threaten the ranch the pair must come together, rekindling their love in the process. Stars Julie Gonzalo, Juan Pablo Di Pace.

programme.title: The Secret Ingredient
programme.desc: Small-town baker, Kelly, gets a big surprise when she is invited to compete on a Valentine's Day baking show in New York City - and an even bigger surprise when she runs into her ex-fiance. Stars Erin Cahill, Brendan Penny.

programme.title: Savoring Paris
programme.desc: Disillusioned with her life, Ella embarks on a soul-searching journey to Paris where she navigates love, self-discovery and cheese amidst the enchanting backdrop of The City of Love. Stars Bethany Joy Lenz and Stanley Weber.

programme.title: A Machu Picchu Proposal
programme.desc: Katie helps plan her brother's proposal atop Machu Picchu. When the proposal is ruined by spontaneous Chef Carlos, Katie enlists Carlos to help her find the most romantic spot in all of Peru. Stars Rhiannon Fish and Alec Santos.

programme.title: A Melbourne Match
programme.desc: Georgie, a travel writer, travels to Melbourne for an assignment where she meets Zach, an ex-Australian footballer who agrees to be her tour guide and shows her that there's more to life than work. Stars Mallory Jansen, Ryan Corr.

programme.title: Very, Very, Valentine
programme.desc: Helen, a shy florist, meets the perfect man at a Valentine's Masquerade Ball. So, she enlists the help of her best friend Henry to track him down only to find that her perfect man may already be right in front of her.

programme.title: Sweeter Than Chocolate
programme.desc: A local chocolatier is rumored to have the secret recipe to finding true love on February 14th, drawing in a TV reporter to investigate. Stars Eloise Mumford, Dan Jeannotte, Brenda Strong.

programme.title: The Real West
programme.desc: A family vacation to a working Ranch introduces Professor Rebecca to Jake West. Rebecca is a widow chasing tenure and Jake is a handsome cowboy who never settled down. Stars Kimberley Sustad, Lucas Bryant and James Denton.

programme.title: Falling for Vermont
programme.desc: When a best-selling author decides to escape the media, her plan goes awry when she's caught in a thunderstorm and crashes her car. She wakes up with no memory of who she is.

programme.title: Winter Love Story
programme.desc: When author Cassie's first novel isn't selling, she is paired on a book tour with author Elliot to boost Cassie's sales - but along the way a romance starts to blossom. Stars Jen Lilley, Kevin McGarry, and Mary-Margaret Humes.

programme.title: Winter in Vail
programme.desc: Chelsea inherits a house in Vail. She meets Owen and gets a much needed break. Together, they put on Strudelfest to highlight the charm of Old Vail. Lacey Chabert, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: Love in Winterland
programme.desc: Ally, a final contestant on a dating show, must face her high school sweetheart when she is chosen for the Hometown Date. Stars Italia Ricci, Chad Michael Murray, & Jack Turner.

programme.title: The Royal We
programme.desc: When her older sister elopes with a non-royal, Princess Bea who has lived her life away from her royal duties must now step in and honor the arranged marriage to a small kingdom prince. Stars Mallory Jansen, Charlie Carrick.

programme.title: A Ring by Spring
programme.desc: A fiercely independent single woman is forced to consider marrying her not-so-perfect boyfriend when a gypsy fortuneteller convinces her she must be engaged by the spring or risk a lifetime alone.

programme.title: Time for You to Come Home for Christmas
programme.desc: When Katherine returns home after her husband passed, she meets a veteran who is on his own holiday journey. As Christmas nears, they learn of a bond that may be the miracle they need. Stars Alison Sweeney, Lucas Bryant.

programme.title: Christmas at the Catnip Café
programme.desc: After inheriting part ownership of a cat cafe, Olivia must spend the weeks leading up to Christmas working there to try and convince veterinarian Ben to sell but manages to find love instead. Staring Erin Cahill and Paul Campbell.

programme.title: A Godwink Christmas
programme.desc: Through a series of coincidences, known as Godwinks, Paula and Gery find their paths keep crossing at Christmas on Martha's Vineyard, as if they are destined for each other. Stars Kathy Lee Gifford, Kimberly Sustad, Paul Campbell.

programme.title: Heaven Down Here
programme.desc: An overwhelmed waitress, along with a pastor, a hospice nurse, and a manager, all desperately in need of a Christmas miracle, get snowed in together at a local diner. Starring Krystal Joy Brown, Tina Lifford, and Phylicia Rashad.

programme.title: Following Yonder Star
programme.desc: A former television star waits out a scandal in Vermont. She becomes close with the innkeeper and his daughter while she helps him direct the local children's Christmas pageant. Stars Brooke D'Orsay and John Brotherton.

programme.title: Christmas in Montana
programme.desc: Before the holidays, Sara goes to Montana to help resistant Travis save his ranch. Can time on the ranch help restore her faith in Christmas in time for a miracle? Stars Kellie Martin, Colin Ferguson.

programme.title: A Maple Valley Christmas
programme.desc: Rancher Erica has spent her whole life working the family farm with her mother and sister. When Aaron arrives and disrupts her plans, she starts to question what it is she actually wants. Starring Peyton List and Andrew Walker.

programme.title: The Christmas Quest
programme.desc: Stefanie teams up with ex-husband Chase to go to Iceland at Christmastime in search of the legendary treasure of the Yule Lads. Lacey Chabert, Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: The Most Wonderful Time of the Year
programme.desc: Single mom Jennifer Cullen is having trouble finding joy in the holiday season. Then her Uncle Ralph arrives at her home with the young, handsome Morgan Derby. Morgan's love of Christmas, and life, is contagious.

programme.title: Haul Out the Holly
programme.desc: When Emily unexpectedly spends the holidays alone at her parents' house, their HOA insists that she participate in its many Christmas festivities. Lacey Chabert, Wes Brown, Stephen Tobolowsky, Melissa Peterman, Ellen Travolta.

programme.title: Santa Tell Me
programme.desc: A design show host finds a letter from Santa promising to meet her true love, a man named Nick, by Christmas Eve. Meeting three Nicks complicates her search. Stars Erin Krakow, Daniel Lissing, Benjamin Ayres, Christopher Russell.

programme.title: Single on the 25th
programme.desc: Despite being lonely during the holidays, Nell finds a fresh outlook when her neighbor Cooper shows her the joy of celebrating Christmas single. Starring Lyndsy Fonseca and Daniel Lissing.

programme.title: If I Only Had Christmas
programme.desc: At Christmas, a cheerful publicist teams up with a cynical VP and his eclectic team to help a charity in need. Stars Candace Cameron Bure and Warren Christie.

programme.title: Picture a Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: A photographer who travels the world takes a few days off around the holidays to care for her grandmother. While there, she meets her neighbor, DAVID who needs help watching his 7 year old nephew. Stars Merritt Patterson, Jon Cor.

programme.title: Tidings for the Season
programme.desc: News anchor, Adam, is challenged by superfan, Robbie, to report good news at Christmas. Adam reluctantly takes him under his wing and finds a connection with Robbie's mom. Stars Tamera Mowry-Housley, BJ Britt, Elijah-Justus Lewis.

programme.title: Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: Host Tamera Mowry-Housley greets ten family pairs of bakers at the holiday baking barn, where they first must prove themselves with pie, and then heat things up with some exquisite yule logs.

programme.title: Checkin' It Twice
programme.desc: A journeyman hockey player falls for a real estate agent in a career crisis when he's traded to her hometown and moves into the cottage in her hockey loving family's backyard. Starring Kim Matula and Kevin McGarry.

programme.title: A Reason for the Season
programme.desc: In order to earn her trust fund and with the help of a handsome local attorney, Evie is tasked with granting Christmas wishes to the people who saved her life on the night of her birth. Stars Taylor Cole and Kevin McGarry.

programme.title: Five Gold Rings
programme.desc: An artist returns home for the holidays and gets tasked with a Christmas quest left by her grandmother. She and the local PI must return lost items to their owners before Christmas. Starring Nolan Gerard Funk and Holland Roden.

programme.title: The Christmas Charade
programme.desc: Facing another dull Christmas alone, sparks fly when a risk-averse librarian accidentally gets wrapped up with a grinchy FBI agent in an undercover mission to save the Heart of Christmas. Stars Rachel Skarsten, Corey Sevier.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: A Fatal Romance
programme.desc: When a romance writer is murdered, matchmaker Angie Dove gets entangled in another case…and with Detective Kyle Carter. Can they read between the lines to find the murderer? Stars Danica McKellar, Victor Webster, Bruce Boxleitner.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: The Art of the Kill
programme.desc: Angie Dove gets Det. Carter's attention by stumbling on a murder at an art museum. Angie's father Nick is on his own case, trying to solve a series of petty thefts at the museum. Danica McKellar, Victor Webster, Bruce Boxleitner.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: A Puzzle to Die For
programme.desc: After several of her puzzles are linked to the murder of an art gallery owner, a crossword puzzle editor teams up with a no nonsense detective to stop a killer in their midst. Stars Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Proposing Murder
programme.desc: Tess dives into Logan's murder investigation of her friend who was about to propose with her help. As she grows closer to the truth, she fears it could ruin everyone's happily ever after. Starring Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Abracadaver
programme.desc: During her birthday celebration, Tess and Logan find themselves swept up in a world that isn't always what it seems when the headlining magician at the Magic Manor winds up dead. Starring Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Terminal Descent
programme.desc: When Tess prepares for a crossword challenge against a super computer, the engineer behind it is murdered, spurring her and Logan to seek answers before they become the next victims. Starring Lacey Chabert and Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Riddle Me Dead
programme.desc: Tess gets invited to be a part of a popular game show, but when the host is unexpectedly murdered, she and Detective Logan O'Connor seek to uncover who was behind it all. Starring Lacey Chabert and Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: Pilot
programme.desc: Jennifer loves scouring garage sales to look for items to sell in her resell shop, but realizes a series of burglaries and a friend's murder may have a connection to the sales.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Jennifer Shannon has an eye for antiques and a mind for solving mysteries. When she buys a storage unit at auction, she has no idea she's opening the door to murder, and realizes the killer is after something in the storage unit.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: The Deadly Room
programme.desc: Jennifer's real-estate agent pal dies while trying to negate rumors about a home she's selling. The police believe there was no foul play, but Jennifer suspects that her friend was killed after she researches other deaths.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: The Wedding Dress
programme.desc: In Jennifer Shannon's latest quest, she stumbles upon a 30 year-old cold case when she comes across a vintage wedding dress containing a clue. As Jenn tracks down the owner, she finds that the Groom mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: Guilty Until Proven Innocent
programme.desc: When Jenn's old pal Sandra becomes the prime suspect in a murder case, it'll be up to her to discover who done it before time runs out. Stars Lori Loughlin, Sarah Strange and Steve Bacic.

programme.title: Flower Shop Mystery: Mum's the Word
programme.desc: Abby Knight is the proud owner of her hometown flower shop, but a SUV just rammed her vintage Corvette in a hit-and-run. She's determined to track down the driver, but the trail turns deadly.

programme.title: Flower Shop Mystery: Snipped in the Bud
programme.desc: When a bouquet from her shop is found at the murder scene of a professor and former courtroom adversary of Abby Knight, a former attorney-turned-small-town-florist, she finds herself as the main suspect. Stars Brooke Shields.

programme.title: Flower Shop Mystery: Dearly Depotted
programme.desc: Abby Knight, ex-lawyer and crime buff, and the owner of Bloomers Flower Shop, is having a week to be reckoned with. A bridesmaid at her drama queen cousin's wedding, Abby ends having to find out who murdered a wedding crasher.

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Framed for Murder
programme.desc: Shannon Hammer, owner of Hammer Construction Company, is an expert in Victorian home restoration. Through her renovations she will find clues to uncover a house's secret past and in turn become an unlikely sleuth.

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Concrete Evidence
programme.desc: When Mac first moved to Lighthouse Cove, he bought the historic lighthouse mansion that the town is named after. During renovation demolition, the bones of a teenage girl were discovered. Stars Jewel and Colin Ferguson.

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Deadly Deed
programme.desc: Shannon Hughes has taken on a charity project renovating an old Victorian mansion. When a local banker is found murdered inside, Shannon must dust off the clues and cement the truth before her renovation becomes a demolition.

programme.title: A Beautiful Place to Die: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: After being forced into retirement, former detective Jeff Jackson returns to a quiet life on Martha's Vineyard. Quiet, at least, until a body washes up and he's drawn back into crime solving. Stars Jesse Metcalfe, Sarah Lind.

programme.title: Riddled with Deceit: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: Former detective Jeff Jackson teams up with Dr. Zee Madeiras to track down their friend's missing emerald brooch, a thief, and also... a murderer. Stars Jesse Metcalfe, Sarah Lind.
